title: Key Account Manager, Food and Nutrition
description:
Position Overview

We are seeking a proactive and dedicated Account Manager/ Key Account Manager with experience in the specialty food ingredients industry to join our dynamic team. This role combines managing and growing existing customer accounts with a strong focus on acquiring new business opportunities. You will play a crucial role in nurturing relationships, ensuring customer satisfaction, and driving revenue growth by identifying new customers and expanding the company’s market share.

This position is ideal for a results-driven professional who thrives in both relationship management and business development. If you excel at retaining and growing existing accounts while actively seeking and converting new prospects, we’d love to hear from you.

Key Responsibilities

  • Account Management & Relationship Building:
  • Cultivate strong relationships with existing principals, suppliers, key accounts, ensuring their ongoing satisfaction and identifying additional growth opportunities.
  • Act as the primary contact for a portfolio of existing accounts, fostering long-term relationships to ensure customer satisfaction and retention.
  • Regularly engage with clients to understand their business needs and proactively offer solutions.
  • New Customer Acquisition:
  • Actively identify, prospect, and pursue new customer opportunities within the target market.
  • Develop and execute strategies to expand the customer base, driving growth and establishing a strong pipeline of potential clients.
  • Incremental Growth & Cross-Selling:
  • Identify opportunities for incremental growth within existing accounts by promoting relevant products and services.
  • Collaborate with the sales team to maximize revenue through upselling and cross-selling initiatives.
  • Customer Support & Problem Resolution:
  • Provide ongoing support to clients, addressing inquiries, troubleshooting issues, and ensuring their needs are met.
  • Coordinate with internal teams to deliver a seamless customer experience and resolve challenges efficiently.
  • Market Awareness & Feedback Gathering:
  • Stay informed about industry trends and competitive activities that impact customer needs or expectations.
  • Collect feedback from clients and prospects to refine product offerings and service approaches, ensuring alignment with market demand.
  • Reporting & Performance Tracking:
  • Track and report on account performance metrics, including customer satisfaction, account growth, and new customer acquisition progress.
  • Prepare regular updates for internal stakeholders on account status, sales pipelines, and emerging opportunities

Position Requirements & Key Abilities

  • Education:Bachelor’s degree in Food Technology/ Food Science or related field.
  • Experience:Proven experience in account management and business development within the Specialty Food industry with at least 5-8 years in a customer-facing role.
  • Business Development Skills:Strong ability to acquire new customers, including prospecting, leadgeneration, and closing sales.
  • Relationship Management: Demonstrated ability to buildand maintain long-term client relationships.
  • Sales Skills:Consultative selling approach with experience in both upselling to existingclients and developing new accounts.
  • Communication:Exceptional interpersonal, verbal, and written communication skills.
  • Analytical Ability:Ability to assess client needs and translate them into actionable strategies.
  • Customer Focus:Commitment to customer success and satisfaction.
  • Tools: Proficiency in MS Office and CRM software.

Key Personal Attributes

  • Customer-Focused: A commitment to meeting and exceeding clientexpectations and building long-term loyalty.
  • Problem-Solver: Strong problem-solving skills with the ability toidentify and address customer challenges effectively.
  • Collaborative: Works effectively within a team, collaborating acrossdepartments to meet customer needs.
  • Detail-Oriented: High attention to detail in managing client accounts,ensuring accurate and timely delivery of solutions.
  • Integrity & Trustworthiness: Demonstrates reliability and builds trust withclients through consistent actions and ethical decision-making.

Please note that this is a general description of the role and its requirements. The duties andresponsibilities within this role may change over the course of employment at the employer’s discretion. 

About Caldic:

At Caldic, we’re a global leader in distribution solutions, serving diverse markets across the world. Joining us means becoming part of an entrepreneurial, collaborative, and innovation-driven team.

We offer:

  • Global opportunities with rapid career growth and development
  • An inclusive, diverse, and dynamic work environment
  • The chance to shape the future of specialty ingredient solutions across industries like food, pharma, personal care, and more

We operate in 43 countries around the world.
Our innovative solutions are tailored to meet the needs of industries such as food, pharma, personal care, and industrial markets, ensuring sustainable success for all stakeholders. To learn more, visit: www.caldic.com

Ready to Join Us?

If you're ready to take your career to the next level and join a global leader, apply now at Caldic!


Equal Opportunity Employer

Caldic celebrates diversity and is committed to fostering an inclusive work environment. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, gender, or any other characteristic.

To all recruitment agencies: Caldic practices direct hiring and does not accept agency resumes. Please do not forward resumes to our jobs alias, Caldic employees or any other organization location. Caldic is not responsible for any fees related to unsolicited resumes**

postedCompany.description:
Caldic is a growing global provider of added-value distribution solutions for the life and material sciences, active across 43 countries in Europe, Latin America, North America, and Asia-Pacific.

Because we care, we touch the lives of hundreds of thousands of people every day. We inspire innovative and sustainable distribution solutions for the food, pharma, personal care, and industrial product formulation markets of the world. Our specialty ingredients and chemicals solutions, carefully sourced and customized to specifications whenever required, are backed by outstanding research & development, customer service, and technical & regulatory support, ensuring that they meet precisely determined needs at every stage of the value chain.

To learn more about Caldic and our complete solutions offerings, visit www.caldic.com.
postedCompany.name: CALDIC SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.
